hero.title: Taiwhanga Whakahaere Hou
hero.description: Tūhura i ngā whakaaturanga pāhekoheko, ngā whakamātautau, me ngā whakaaturanga hangarau mai i tā mātou tīma pūkaha.

hero.title: Taiwhanga Whakahaere Hou
hero.description: Ka tūhura mātou i ngā rohe ā-ringa i roto i te AI, te aunoatanga, me ngā pūnaha tuari, kātahi ka whakamāoritia te rangahau whakamana ki ngā āheinga whakanao pono.

researchAreas.title: Ngā Wāhi Rangahau
researchAreas.description: Ka takiruatia e ia wāhi arotahi te rangahau hōpara me ngā ara whakatinanatanga i hoahoatia mō ngā pūnaha ao tūturu.

detailedFocusBriefs.title: Ngā Kōrero Arotahi Taipitopito
detailedFocusBriefs.description: Ko ngā mahi rangahau tata e neke ana mai i te whakamanatanga hoahoa ki ngā mahere tuku.

fromLabToProduction.title: Mai i te Taiwhanga ki te Whakanaotanga
fromLabToProduction.description: Ko te mahi hou i Horizon e inetia ana e ngā putanga tuku, ehara i ngā tauira tauira motuhake.

roadmap.title: Mahere Huarahi R&D
roadmap.description: He nekehanga ā-wāhanga mai i te hanganga āheinga ki ngā pūnaha urutau, whakapai haere tonu.

publications.title: Ngā Tānga me ngā Kitenga
publications.description: Ngā tuhipoka tuhituhi hangarau me ngā tuhipoka whakatinanatanga mai i ngā mahi hou e haere tonu ana.

appliedAi.title: Ngā Pūnaha AI Hoatu
appliedAi.description: Ko ngā hoahoa AI arotahi ki te whakanaotanga e hāngai ana i te ratonga tauira, te whakaraupapa āhuahira, me te whakamātautau whakahaere.

automationFrameworks.title: Ngā Anga Aunoatanga
automationFrameworks.description: Ngā utauta aunoatanga ā-roto mō te haumarutanga tukunga, te urupare takahanga, me ngā rerengamahi pūkaha tukurua.

advancedArchitecture.title: Whakamātautau Hoahoa Arā Atu Anō
advancedArchitecture.description: Rangahau ki ngā hoahoa pakari, tūaritia e arotautia ana mō te mahinga, te manawanui hē, me te tauine.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Ko te mōhiohio i te tapa mō te whakatau pāpaku, te tukatuka waea, me te hononga rererangi pūrere.

nlp.title: Tukatuka Reo Māori
nlp.description: Ngā paipa māramatanga reo maha mō te taunahatanga, te unuhanga, te whakamāoritanga, me ngā pūnaha kōrerorero.

evolutionaryAlgorithms.title: Ngā Hātepe Hātepe Kunenga me te Arotautanga
evolutionaryAlgorithms.description: Ko ngā pūnaha rapu me te arotautanga i whakaawetia e te tīpakonga māori hei whakaoti i ngā uauatanga pūkaha ahu-tiketike.

automationFrameworks.title: Ngā Anga Aunoatanga
automationFrameworks.description: Kei te hanga mātou i ngā anga rerengamahi ka taea te tito mō te whakaraupapa tuku, ngā kēti kounga, me te manatokonga i muri i te hora hei whakaiti i te whāngai ā-ringa me te whakapai ake i te whaikikotanga.

advancedArchitecture.title: Whakamātautau Hoahoa Arā Atu Anō
advancedArchitecture.description: E arotahi ana ā mātou whakamātautau hoahoa ki ngā rautaki pirau ratonga, ngā tauira manahau whakawhiti-rohe, me ngā pūhera mahinga mō ngā pūnaha e mahi ana i raro i te tono pūkoro.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Kei te whakamana mātou i ngā hoahoa roma takahanga me ngā hoahoa whakatau tapa e taea ai ngā whakataunga paetata tere ake me te pupuri i te mana pūtahi, te arotaupū, me te whakahaere huringa ora tauira.

adaptiveCapacityPlanning.title: Whakamahere Kaha Urutau
adaptiveCapacityPlanning.description: Ka whakamanatia ngā tauira taiwhanga ki ngā kawenga mahi whakataruna, kātahi ka whakaurua ki ngā rautaki tauine aunoa pūhara.

operationalIntelligence.title: Mōhiohio Whakahaere
operationalIntelligence.description: Ka neke ngā arapae NLP mai i ngā whakamātautau whakahaere ki ngā rerengamahi tautoko whakanao kia tere ake ai te whakamātautau me ngā kitenga mārama ake.

optimizationInDeliverySystems.title: Arotautanga i roto i ngā Pūnaha Tuku
optimizationInDeliverySystems.description: Ko ngā tikanga kunenga i whakamātauria i roto i te taiwhanga ka whakamāoritia ki ngā pūkaha arotautanga mō te whakarite me te tohatoha.

edgeDecisioning.title: Whakatau Tapa
edgeDecisioning.description: Ka whakapakeketia ngā whakamātautau IoT me ngā whakamātautau tapa ki ngā ratonga latency iti me ngā herenga whaikiko pākaha.

now.title: Ngā Tūāpapa AI Hoatu
now.description: Whakawhānuitia ngā tātauira mahi tauira ka taea te whakamahi anō, ngā huinga arotake, me ngā paerewa mātakitaki puta noa i ngā tīma hua.

next.title: Ngā Rerengamahi Pūkaha Motuhake
next.description: Whakahaerehia ngā anga aunoatanga e whakaiti ana i te mōrea tukunga me te whakapoto i ngā koromeke urupare mō te tukunga.

twelveToEighteenMonths.title: Mōhiohio Māori Tapa
twelveToEighteenMonths.description: Tauine i ngā hoahoa kapua-tapa hinu mō te whakatauranga tata ki te wā tūturu i roto i ngā taiao tairongo-latency.

longHorizon.title: Ngā Pūnaha Arotautanga Motukore
longHorizon.description: Whakakotahitia te whakamātautau, te aroturuki, me te arotautanga kia taea ai e ngā pūnaha te urutau haumaru i te huringa horopaki.

aiReliability.title: Ngā pūnaha AI pūkaha e noho pono ana i roto i te whakanaotanga
aiReliability.summary: He tirohanga ā-ringa ki te whakataurite i te tere whakamātautau ki te whakahaere whakanao.

distributedArchitecturePatterns.title: Ngā Tauira Hoahoa Tūaritia mō ngā Pūhara Tipu Tiketike
distributedArchitecturePatterns.summary: Ko ngā tuhipoka āpure mai i ngā whakamātautau hoahoa i arotahi ki te mahinga, te manawanui, me te ngāwari mahi.

roadmappingAppliedRd.title: Roadmapping Applied R&D for Business Outcomes
roadmappingAppliedRd.summary: He pēhea tā mātou hanga i ngā mahi hou kia neke ai ngā kitenga mai i te tauira ki te uara ine.

cta.title: Hanga me te Taiwhanga Hou o Horizon
cta.description: Mahi tahi me mātou ki te whakamana wawe i ngā whakaaro nui me te neke i ngā ariā kua whakamātauria ki ngā pūnaha whakanao haumaru, tauine hoki.

hero.title: Ngā Pūnaha AI Hoatu
hero.description: He tirohanga whānui ā-ringa o te hoahoa a Horizon, te hora, me te whakahaere i ngā pūnaha ako mīhini mai i te tauira ki te whakanaotanga.

machineLearningPipelines.title: Ngā Paipa Ako Mīhini
machineLearningPipelines.description: Ka tīmata te AI whakanao ki ngā paipa whakaputa anō e tūhono ana i ngā raraunga, te whakamātautau, te whakamanatanga, me te urupare.

modelDeploymentPatterns.title: Tauira Tauira Tukunga
modelDeploymentPatterns.description: Ka tīpakohia te rautaki tukunga i runga anō i ngā whakaritenga latency, te takenui pakihi, me te matatini mahi.

mlopsOperatingModel.title: Tauira Mahi MLOps
mlopsOperatingModel.description: Mā ngā mahi MLOps e whakarite kia noho pono tonu ngā pūnaha AI, ka taea te whakahaere, me te tauine i te tipu o te whakamahinga.

monitoringAndReliability.title: Aroturuki me te Whaikikotanga
monitoringAndReliability.description: Ka kati te mātakitaki i te koromeke i waenga i te whanonga tauira me ngā putanga mahi.

dataAndFeatureEngineering.title: Pūkaha Raraunga me te Āhuahira
dataAndFeatureEngineering.description: Ko te whakaurunga raraunga putanga, ngā taki kounga, me ngā tikanga āhuahira ka taea te whakamahi anō ka waihanga i tētahi tūāpapa pono mō te whakangungu tauira.

modelDevelopment.title: Whanaketanga Tauira
modelDevelopment.description: Ka aroturukitia ngā whakamātautau ki ngā whirihoranga ka taea te whakaputa, ngā ine whāinga, me ngā tauanga whakataurite aunoa.

validationAndSafetyGates.title: Ngā Kuwaha Whakamanatanga me te Haumaru
validationAndSafetyGates.description: Ka puta ngā tauira kaitono i ngā taki mahinga, pakari, me ngā kaupapahere i mua i te whakaaetanga mō te tukunga.

operationalFeedbackLoops.title: Ngā Koromeke Urupare Mahi
operationalFeedbackLoops.description: Ka whakamōhio atu te ine waea i muri i te tukunga ki ngā manakē whakangungu anō, ngā whakataunga whakahoki, me te whakamahere whitiauau panuku.

realTimeInferenceServices.title: Ngā Ratonga Whakatauranga Wā-Tūturu
realTimeInferenceServices.description: Ngā API pāhekoheko mō ngā taupānga tauwhiti me te tauineaunoa, keteroki, me te mātakitaki taumata-tono.

batchAndStreamingPredictions.title: Ngā Matapae Rōpu me te Roma
batchAndStreamingPredictions.description: Ngā paipa kua whakaritea, ā-takahanga hoki mō te tapeke rōrahi tiketike puta noa i ngā tātaritanga me ngā rerengamahi mahi.

edgeAwareDeployment.title: Tukunga Mōhio-Tapa
edgeAwareDeployment.description: Ngā tauira ratonga kapua-tapa hiku mō ngā taiao e hiahia ana ki te whakatauranga paetata me te whakahaere tauira pūtahi.

ciCdForModels.title: CI/KK mō ngā Tauira
ciCdForModels.description: Ko ngā rerengamahi hanga, whakamātautau, tuku aunoa e whakaiti ana i te mōrea tukunga me te pupuri i te tere tuku.

modelRegistryAndLifecycle.title: Rēhita Tauira me te Huringa Ora
modelRegistryAndLifecycle.description: Ko ngā taonga tauira putanga me ngā wāhanga whakatairanga, whakapapa, me ngā rerengamahi whakaaetanga e whakapai ake ana i te mana me te aroturuki.

servingInfrastructure.title: Te Mahi i te Hanganga
servingInfrastructure.description: Ko ngā apa mahi tauine me ngā rautaki whakawhiti pēnei i ngā tukunga kōruru me ngā tukunga kōruru e tautoko ana i te whakahaere huringa haumaru.

monitoringPillars.predictionQualityAndDriftDetection: Kounga matapae me te haurapa mānu
monitoringPillars.latencyThroughputAndCostEfficiencyTracki: Latency, throughput, me te aroturuki tōtika utu
monitoringPillars.dataQualityRegressionAlertsAndRemediatio: Ngā matohi whakaheke kounga raraunga me ngā rerengamahi rongoā
monitoringPillars.auditabilityForComplianceAndIncidentAnal: Te āheitanga mō te whakatikatika me te tātari takanga

cta.title: Tauine AI Hoatu me te Maia
cta.description: Mēnā kei te whakamahere koe i ngā mahi AI e hiahia ana ki ngā putanga ine me te tautiakitanga mo te wā roa, ka taea e Horizon te āwhina ki te hoahoa me te whakahaere i te huringa ora katoa o te pūnaha.
cta.secondary: Tūhura i ētahi atu mahi taiwhanga

hero.title: TTP Reo-Maha
hero.description: Tūhura i ngā āheinga tukatuka reo māori me te tauine ki ngā pūnaha whakanao reo maha.

foundations.title: Ngā Tūāpapa NLP
foundations.description: Ko te tukanga reo māori e whakakotahi ana i ngā tohu reo me te ako mīhini hei tango i te tikanga, te whāinga, me te hanganga mai i te kuputuhi.

workbench.title: Tēpu Mahi NLP Tauwhiti
workbench.description: Whakamahia te tauira hei whakamātau i te haurapa reo, te tapeke whakaaro, te unuhanga hinonga, me ngā whanonga whakamāori i te wā tūturu.

productionApplications.title: He pēhea te Hoatu a Horizon i te NLP i roto i te Whakanaotanga
productionApplications.description: Kua whakaurua ngā āheinga NLP ki ngā rerengamahi pakihi me ngā ārai mahinga me ngā ine kounga ūkui.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: Ngā Tikanga Pono me te Whakahaere
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: E hiahiatia ana e te NLP whakanao he nui ake i te kounga tauira; Kei te āhua tonu o ngā mahi whakataka haumaru me te manatokonga motukore.

foundations.intro1: Tautoko hiko ngā pūnaha NLP o nāianei i te aunoatanga, te hāngaitanga rapu, te unuhanga mātauranga, me te ngātahitanga reo maha. E hiahiatia ana e te whakatinanatanga tōtika te kounga tauira me ngā mana whakahaere kaha.
foundations.intro2: I Horizon, ka arotahi mātou ki ngā pūnaha NLP mutunga-ki-te-mutunga e whakakotahi ana i te whakaaro pakari me te mātakitaki, te whakahaere, me te pānga whakanao ine.

languageDetection.title: Haurapa Reo
languageDetection.description: Ka tautohu i te reo mai i ngā wāhanga kuputuhi poto, roa rānei hei ararere i ngā tono ki te ararere tukatuka tika.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Tātari Whakaaro
sentimentAnalysis.description: Ka tango i te whāinga ā-hinengaro me te polarity mō te mōhiohio kiritaki, te tautoko, me ngā koromeke urupare hua.

entityExtraction.title: Unuhanga Hinonga
entityExtraction.description: Ka kite i ngā mea hanganga pēnei i ngā ingoa, ngā kamupene, ngā tauwāhi, me ngā rā mai i ngā kupu kāore i hangaia.

translation.title: Whakamāori
translation.description: Ka tautoko i ngā rerengamahi reomaha mā te whakamāori i ngā kupu i hangaia e te kaiwhakamahi, i ngā kupu whakahaere rānei me te pupuri horopaki.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Tautoko me te Mōhiohio Tīkiti
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Whakarōpūtia ngā tono taumai mā te ohorere, te whāinga, me te whakaaro hei whakatere ake i te kounga o te ararere me te urupare.

governedContentOperations.title: Ngā Mahi Ihirangi Whakahaere
governedContentOperations.description: Hoatu ngā tātari reo mōhio kaupapahere me ngā taki whakaōrite me ngā ūnga auporo e taea te ine.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Ngā Kitenga Pakihi ā-Kuputuhi
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Whakahiato i ngā ia mai i ngā tuhinga, ngā arotakenga, me ngā whakawhitiwhitinga hei whakamōhio i te rautaki me ngā whakataunga whakahaere.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Arotakenga mā te Pū Whakamahi
evaluationByUseCase.description: Ka tohutohutia ngā tauira ki ngā huinga raraunga ā-rohe i mua i te whakataunga tuku.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Ngā Parenga Tangata-i-te-Koromeke
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: Kei roto i ngā matapae pānga tiketike ko ngā ara arotake, ngā ture whakarerekētanga, me ngā tohu whirinaki pūataata.

continuousMonitoring.title: Aroturuki Motukore
continuousMonitoring.description: Ka aroturukitia tonutia te mānu, te tārewa, me te whakahekenga kounga kia kaha ai te whakangungu anō me te whakahoki.

hero.title: Whakataruna Hātepe Iranga
hero.description: Tūhura i te tātai kunenga i roto i tētahi taiao tauwhitiwhiti me te kite me pēhea te whakamāoritanga o aua mātāpono ki ngā pūnaha arotautanga whakanao.

scientificFoundation.title: Tūāpapa Pūtaiao
scientificFoundation.description: Ko ngā hātepe iranga he tikanga arotautanga ā-iwi whānui i whakaawetia e te tīpakonga māori me te urutaunga.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Taiao Kunenga Tauwhitiwhiti
interactiveEnvironment.description: Whakahaerehia te whakataruna kia kite i te whakapai ake i te kaha i ia whakatupuranga, me te mātaki i te āhua o te pēhanga tīpakonga e whakaawe ana i ngā putanga.

productionUse.title: He pēhea te whakamahi a Horizon i tēnei i roto i te whakanaotanga
productionUse.description: Ko ngā pūkaha rapu ōrite e whakamahia ana i tēnei tauira e whakamōhio ana i ngā paipa arotautanga e horaina ana i roto i ngā pūnaha whakahaere.

applicationDomains.title: Ngā Rohe Taupānga Whānui Ake
applicationDomains.description: He tino whai hua te arotautanga kunenga i roto i ngā pūnaha whai whāinga hihiri me ngā herenga papā.

scientificFoundation.intro1: Ehara i te rapu rongoā kotahi i te wā kotahi, ka whakawhanake ngā hātepe iranga i te iwi whānui rerekē o ngā kaitono. Ka arotakea ia whakatupuranga ki tētahi taumahi hauora, ā, ka whakamāramatia mā te tīpakonga, te whakawhitinga, me te irakētanga.
scientificFoundation.intro2: Mā tēnei ka pai mō ngā raruraru ahu-tiketike me ngā herenga paerangi-kore, e noho ai ngā huarahi deterministic hei ngāwari, he nui rānei te utu ā-rorohiko.

selection.title: Tīpakonga
selection.description: He nui ake te ora o ngā kaitono mahi tiketike me te whakaawe i te whakatupuranga e whai ake nei.

crossover.title: Whakawhiti
crossover.description: Ka whakakotahitia anōtia ngā āhuatanga kaha hei waihanga rongoā kaitono hōu me ngā kaha whāranu.

mutation.title: irakētanga
mutation.description: Ka whakamōhiotia e te matapōkere mana te rerenga kētanga kia kore ai te rapu e whakatārewa i te optima paetata.

convergence.title: Ūngututanga
convergence.description: I roto i ngā whakatupuranga maha, ka ahu te iwi whānui ki ngā rongoā pūmau, tino kounga.

resourceScheduling.title: Whakahōtaka Rauemi
resourceScheduling.description: Ka whakamahi mātou i ngā rautaki kunenga hei arotau i te hōtaka herenga-maha e kore ai e taea te rapu tōpana kino.

architectureTuning.title: Whakarite Hoahoa
architectureTuning.description: Ka arotakea auauau ngā whirihoranga hanganga kaitono hei whakapai ake i te mahinga me te tōtika utu.

continuousOptimization.title: Arotautanga Motukore
continuousOptimization.description: Ka whakahaere ngā tūtira arotautanga i roto i ngā koromeke whakahaere me te urupare ine waea kia urutau ai ngā pūnaha ki te neke o ngā kōtaha tono.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Te Whakarite Ararere me te Rārangi Mahi
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Ka whai hua te tukunga matatini me te whakamahere tuku i te rapunga kunenga ina tere te rerekētanga o ngā herenga.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Rapu Tauira me te Tawhāitua
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: Ka taea e te rapu iranga te kite i ngā whirihoranga tauira kounga tiketike ina turituri ngā mata whāinga, ā, kāore i te raina.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Ngā Raru Kōpaki me te Tohatoha
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Ka taea te tāpare i te arotautanga i raro i ngā whāinga tauwhāinga hei whakawhitiwhiti kaha puta noa i ngā huinga kaitono e tipu ana.
